title: Aussie Malty Beef Wrap
description: A flavorful and indulgent beef wrap filled with the sweetness of malted beef, topped with crispy lettuce and tomato.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the malty beef with salt and pepper, then grill for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your liking.
Let the beef rest for 5 minutes before slicing thinly against the grain.
Warm the Australian whole wheat wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading Australian BBQ sauce on the wrap, followed by sliced malty beef, crisp lettuce, juicy tomato, and Australian cheddar cheese.
Top with chopped fresh parsley and fold the wrap in half to serve.
